arts.ttl: Liverpool contract offer ‘short’ of Van Dijk expectations
arts.sum: Liverpool have made a contract offer to Virgil van Dijk as the club look to tie the captain down to a new deal. Van Dijk’s current contract expires at the end of the season, with the Dutch defender one of three high-profile players whose deals are nearing their conclusion.
